  • Certificate Fee: USD 20

Because the programme is self-paced, participants can learn according to their own schedules and complete modules at their convenience.

Learning Objectives

By the end of the course, participants will be able to:

  1. Explain the contribution of sustainable finance toward achieving:
    • Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)
    • Paris Agreement climate goals
  2. Understand key sustainable finance concepts and frameworks.
  3. Describe how sustainability considerations impact financial sector decisions.
  4. Identify the role of regulations and industry initiatives in shaping sustainable finance.
  5. Understand different sustainable finance instruments such as:
    • Green bonds
    • Sustainable loans
    • Sustainability-linked products
  6. Apply sustainable finance principles in policy and business contexts.

UN Digital Certificate

Participants who score at least 70% on all quizzes become eligible for a UN digital certificate of completion.

Important certificate details:

  • Participants have up to 3 attempts per quiz.
  • Certificate becomes available after successful completion and payment of USD 20.
  • The digital certificate can be downloaded and shared professionally.

This certificate provides added value for professionals working in:

  • Banking
  • Development finance
  • ESG consulting
  • Sustainability management
  • Government policy
  • Climate programmes
  • Investment management

Who Should Take This Course?

The course is designed for participants from diverse sectors including:

  • Government institutions
  • Financial institutions
  • Universities and academia
  • Civil society organizations
  • Businesses and corporations
  • Climate professionals
  • Sustainability practitioners
  • Development organizations
  • Students and researchers

It is especially valuable for individuals interested in:

  • ESG investing
  • Climate finance
  • Sustainable development
  • Green economy transitions
  • Corporate sustainability

Key Benefits of the Course

Participants will benefit from:

1. Global Recognition

Receive a UN-affiliated certificate that strengthens professional credibility in sustainability and finance.

2. Flexible Learning

Complete the course online at your own pace from anywhere in the world.

3. Industry-Relevant Knowledge

Gain practical insights into sustainable finance instruments and frameworks used globally.

4. Career Advancement

Enhance opportunities in sustainability, banking, ESG, climate policy, and development sectors.

5. Climate Literacy

Develop deeper understanding of how financial systems influence environmental and social outcomes.

Institutions Behind the Course

The course reflects collaboration among globally recognized organizations advancing sustainable finance and green economy initiatives.

Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ)

GIZ works globally with governments and institutions to promote sustainable development and innovative financial systems.

Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken (SEB)

SEB is a pioneer in green bond development and sustainable finance innovation.

UNEP Finance Initiative (UNEP FI)

UNEP FI collaborates with financial institutions worldwide to accelerate sustainable finance.

Partnership for Action on Green Economy (PAGE)

PAGE supports countries in integrating sustainability into economic policy and development planning.

How to Enroll

Interested participants can enroll directly through the official course platform.

Apply Here 

Why You Should Apply

As global economies increasingly prioritize sustainability and climate resilience, sustainable finance knowledge is becoming essential across industries.

This course provides a strong foundation for anyone seeking to understand:

  • Green investments
  • Climate finance
  • ESG integration
  • Sustainable banking
  • Environmental risk management
  • Sustainable development financing

Whether you are a student, policymaker, entrepreneur, banker, or sustainability professional, this course offers practical knowledge that aligns with current global trends and future opportunities.
